page: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for massive parallel computing workloads. It features eight NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs with a total of 640 GB of VRAM, paired with 96 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor running at 2.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 1360 GB of system memory, providing 14.17 GB of RAM per core, and includes 3000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.

Performance benchmarks highlight a clear tradeoff between single-core and multi-core capabilities. While single-core CPU performance and single-threaded compression tasks score in the bottom 25%, multi-core operations and extended instruction tests rank in the top 25%. Memory bandwidth for small cached blocks is exceptionally high, though large block read and write operations perform in the middle tier.

The server excels in large language model inference, achieving top-tier performance in the top 10% for prompt processing across small, medium, and large models, as well as text generation for 7B and 70B models. This high-density hardware configuration offers qualitative cost efficiency for massive deep learning and AI workloads by consolidating compute resources, though it represents a significant resource commitment that may be underutilized for standard sequential processing. It is best suited for LLM training, high-performance computing, and large-scale data science jobs.
description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server engineered for demanding parallel computing and machine learning workloads. The hardware profile includes eight NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs delivering 640 GB of total VRAM, 96 vCPUs from an Intel Xeon x86_64 processor, 1360 GB of system memory, and 3000 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. Benchmark results demonstrate top-tier performance in LLM inference prompt processing and strong multi-core CPU capabilities, contrasting with weaker single-core performance. This server offers high resource density, making it qualitatively cost-efficient for consolidating massive AI training and inference pipelines. It is highly recommended for large language model deployment, deep learning, and complex data science simulations.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 96 vCPUs, 1360 GB RAM, and 3000 GB NVMe SSD storage, built for top-tier LLM inference and multi-core workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform a2-ultragpu-8g features 8 NVIDIA A100 GPUs, 96 vCPUs, and 1360 GB RAM, delivering top-tier performance for LLM inference.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized platform featuring eight high-capacity GPUs and massive memory for demanding deep learning and large language model inference workloads.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs with 640 GB total VRAM
96 vCPUs powered by Intel Xeon x86_64 processors
1360 GB system memory and 3000 GB local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier benchmark performance in LLM inference prompt processing
Strong multi-core CPU and high-bandwidth cached memory performance
Optimized for deep learning, AI training, and large-scale data science
